app.name: TripTally
app.one_sentence_promise: A trip-specific shared expense ledger that handles multiple currencies and settles up without everyone needing the app or being online.
app.target_user: Groups of friends or family splitting costs across a multi-day, multi-currency trip.
app.painful_moment: Generic expense splitters aren't trip-aware — no day-by-day view, no currency-at-time-of-purchase handling, and everyone must be online with the same app.
app.why_different: A trip-day timeline view of spending with manually-entered, locked-at-time exchange rates (no live FX dependency), letting one organizer log for the whole group and export a settle-up summary via Messages/PDF.
app.why_users_pay: Multiple simultaneous trips, receipt photo OCR, multi-organizer collaborative editing via exchanged trip files, detailed spend-by-category reports.
app.subscription_model: Free: 1 active trip, manual entry only. Paid: unlimited trips, OCR receipts, detailed reports.
app.local_first_mvp_scope: Fully local ledger per trip; sharing/settling via exported summary (share sheet/PDF/text), not live multi-device sync.
app.future_backend_roadmap: Real-time shared ledger via CloudKit sharing so multiple people edit the same trip live.
core_workflows: Log an expense with currency and split
ios_native_features: Live Activities for active trip-day spend total
App Intents for quick expense logging
app.ar_ml_llm_fit: On-device Vision OCR for receipt photo capture of amount and currency.
app.design_direction: Clean financial-editorial look, currency-forward typography, a trip-day timeline as the visual centerpiece.
app.claude_design_prompt: Design a clean, currency-forward trip-expense app: a day-by-day spend timeline as the hero view, a fast expense-entry sheet with currency picker, and a clear settle-up summary screen suitable for exporting.
app.app_store_positioning: The trip expense ledger built for real multi-currency, multi-day travel — not a generic bill splitter.
key_risks: Value depends on one diligent organizer logging for the group
Manually-entered exchange rates must be clearly labeled as user-entered, not live
Risk of reading as 'just Splitwise for trips' if execution doesn't distinguish it
app.invalidation_criteria: If organizers churn mid-trip at a high rate, the single-logger dependency fails and needs a faster, lighter capture flow.
app.v1_build_scope: Trip/traveler setup, expense logging with currency, day timeline, settle-up calculation, export summary.
